Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10001 0 0}Hey, 'sup? I'm gonna head out soon. How 'bout you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It looks like Tomochika wants to hang out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}I wanna talk to you for a sec.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}Don't worry, it won't take long.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend some time after[n]school with Tomochika?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}Cool. Let's hang out then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 2 -1 -1 0 0}I guess I gotta tell you this someday...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 2 -1 -1 0 0}C'mon, let's head to the courtyard downstairs.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}Let's go somewhere we can talk in private...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}...I was just thinking. I bet Takeba-san has some pretty high standards, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}You'd probably have to be a real Prince Charming if you wanna get her attention.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well... Not like it matters to me, anyway. I'm not really interested in her.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10063 0 0}...Oh yeah, totally random, but have you ever heard of the "Gourmet King"?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}Apparently, there's a "foodie" around here who's a cut above the rest.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}They say he's a student at our school.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}Wouldn't it be cool if he told us the best places to eat? I'd totally take a date there.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10061 0 0}I heard he's really into sandwiches now, so you could probably catch him eating one in town.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Tomochika gave me a lead[n]on the "Gourmet King"...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10051 0 0}Hm... I'd like to say I know my ramen, but the Gourmet King is on a whole 'nother level.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}Apparently, that guy knows about some secret menus, too. Like, he'll order rice bowls at Hagakure.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 6 -1 -1 0 0}Rumor has it, he's been eating sandwiches in the middle of town... Just who the heck is this guy?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10020 0 0}Hey... You wanna know the secret to a happy relationship with the girl you like?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}Normally, you'd just hang out, chat, and get to know each other better, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}But you gotta watch what you say. If you step on a landmine, it'll all go up in smoke.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}And when that happens, it's over, she's through. Usually, it won't be that bad, but still...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}If she does walk out on you... Hm, what should you do...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}I guess you just gotta get on your hands and knees and beg for forgiveness. Even if it takes days.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10083 0 0}Not that I'd ever have to worry about that! Nobody knows Emiri better than me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}Anyways, I'm gonna head out soon. How 'bout you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}I actually wanted to talk to you for a sec...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}Don't worry, it won't take long.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}Uh, but never mind that. Dude, this is not good.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, that reminds me! Exams are finally over, huh.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}Whew, thank god. Looks like we both made it out alive![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}Man, I studied my ass off for Emiri... Havin' a girlfriend sure is a big motivator, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}Man, I feel so tired all of a sudden...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10001 0 0}Hey, 'sup, dude? I'm gonna head out soon. How 'bout you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}Anyways, I'm gonna head out soon. How 'bout you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}Then how 'bout we go out for ramen again? I wanna hear more about you, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10005 0 0}You headin' out? I got nothing to do today. Again...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}By the way, you headin' out? I got nothing to do today. Again...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10068 0 0}Ooh, lucky me. Let's go somewhere then.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}...And it's gotta be you-know-where.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}By the way, you're headin' out, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}Let's go to Wilduck. There's a lot I wanna talk about today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 6 -1 -1 0 0}O-Oh, {f 4 1}. You wanna grab ramen, right? Sure.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 6 -1 -1 0 0}O-Oh, right. You wanna grab ramen, right? Sure.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10072 0 0}...Alright, let's go. Guess I'll get myself an extra-large special.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}You got a sec? I need to talk to you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}Hey, uh... You got a sec? I need to talk to you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10046 0 0}Thanks for makin' time for me. I appreciate it, man.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 6 -1 -1 0 0}I'm not really in the mood for ramen today, so let's just head to Wilduck.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 6 -1 -1 0 0}If you got the time... could we talk?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 6 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, right. If you got the time... could we talk?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}You're good with ramen, right? Yeah, let's do ramen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}I got nothing to do today. If you're not busy, let's go get some ramen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}Man, I got nothing to do today. If you're free, let's go get some ramen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}I'mma get an extra-large special today and... Hm, should I also order a rice bowl?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 6 -1 -1 0 0}That sucks. Alright, laters.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}Uh, it's cool, no worries. See you around.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}What am I supposed to do now...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EVENTPLAY
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Message issued by the script. [n]{f 1 5 0}Comm Event Replay.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_PERSPNA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel as if we can grow closer thanks to the[n]{f 2 4 2} Persona, {f 0 1 35}{f 2 4 5}{f 0 1 27}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALSELECTMSG_MAX
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel an unbreakable bond[n]with {f 2 4 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALMSG_BS_MAX
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel an unbreakable bond[n]with the elderly couple...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALSELECTMSG_RAN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like I might grow closer[n]to {f 2 4 0} soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALMSG_BS_RANKUP
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like I might grow closer[n]to the elderly couple soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALSELECTMSG_NOR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I don't think our bond will grow[n]any stronger even if I spend[n]more time with {f 2 4 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALMSG_BS_NORMAL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I don't think our bond will grow[n]any stronger even if I spend[n]more time with them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALSELECTMSG_MAX
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem that our relationship[n]can get any closer than it is...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I still spend time with them...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_SOLO_AS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend some time after[n]school with {f 2 4 0}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_SOLO_DT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the day[n]with {f 2 4 0}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND__GENERAL_MSG_NET
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend time online playing[n]the MMORPG with {f 2 4 0}...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_SOLO_NT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the evening[n]with {f 2 4 0}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_MULTIPLE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend some time after[n]school with the {f 2 4 1}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_FASHION_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend some time after[n]school at the fashion club?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_BOOKSTOR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the day at the bookstore?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_BOOKSTOR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend some time[n]after school at the bookstore?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_MULTIPLE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the night[n]with {f 2 4 1}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I saw your exam results. Good work.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Here, this is from the chairman.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4108 0 0}It's a reward for effectively balancing schoolwork as well as our... ahem, "extracurricular activities."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: UNUSED LABEL[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Since I placed at the top in the exams,[n]I also got this {f 4 4 1 37 1 3}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I saw your exam results. Good work.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Here, this is from the chairman.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4108 0 0}It's a reward for effectively balancing schoolwork as well as our... ahem, "extracurricular activities."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I saw your exam results. Good work.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Here, this is from the chairman.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4131 0 0}It's a reward for effectively balancing schoolwork as well as our... ahem, "extracurricular activities."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Since I placed at the top in the exams,[n]I also got this {f 4 4 1 37 1 3}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I saw your exam results. Good work.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Here, this is from the chairman.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4108 0 0}It's a reward for effectively balancing schoolwork as well as our... ahem, "extracurricular activities."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: UNUSED LABEL[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I saw your exam results. Good work.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's admirable how you continue to excel in school while fighting arduous battle after battle.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}I got you a gift to acknowledge all your hard work. Here, take it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}未使用ラベルです。[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}I saw your exam results. Good work.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}It's admirable how you continue to excel in school while fighting arduous battle after battle.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}I got you a gift to acknowledge all your hard work. Here, take it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Since I placed at the top in the exams,[n]I also got this {f 4 4 1 37 1 3}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I saw your exam results. Good work.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's admirable how you continue to excel in school while fighting arduous battle after battle.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4108 0 0}I got you a gift to acknowledge all your hard work. Here, take it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: UNUSED LABEL[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Since I placed at the top in the exams,[n]I also got this {f 4 4 1 37 1 3}.[n]{f 1 1}
